sections.heading: About Heritage Fence Builders
body: Heritage Fence Builders is an owner-operated fencing company in Sebastopol, run by Jason Gonsalves and serving homeowners across Sonoma County since 2007. As a single-operator shop, Jason handles the work himself — from the first call and estimate through to a clean, finished fence.

Customers consistently note that he returns calls promptly, lays out several fencing options without pushing the most expensive one, and finishes on time at a fair price. The company is a licensed California fencing contractor, license #904463, and has earned 23 reviews from local clients.

items.quote: Returned my call right away, gave me several fencing options without pushing the priciest, and finished on time at a fair price.
items.author: Verified Yelp review · Sebastopol
